# Tcllib Vendor Files

This directory vendors the minimal Tcllib 2.0 packages used by Pino's Tcl app:

- `sha1/sha256.tcl` for SHA-256 object and commit IDs.
- `json/json.tcl`, `json/json_tcl.tcl`, and `json/json_write.tcl` for commit manifest parsing and writing.

Source: `https://github.com/tcltk/tcllib`, tag `tcllib-2-0`.

The Tcllib license is included in `license.terms`.
